hints.usernameChars: Latin letters and digits; spaces become underscores.
hints.betaNoEmailVerify: Beta: no email verification — go straight to Dashboard after signup
hints.betaUsernameLogin: Beta test: you can also sign in with username only.
hints.betaBannerBody: After signup you go straight to the Dashboard. Email verification is not required in this period.

legal.title: OPERATIONAL AND LEGAL PROTOCOL
legal.checkbox: I have read, understood, and accept the {{count}}-article Operational and Legal Protocol above.
legal.requiredHint: Read and accept the {{count}}-article protocol to join.
legal.mustAccept: Read and accept the {{count}}-article protocol to register

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.

errors.providerDisabled: Google sign-in is not enabled in Firebase Console

errors.redirectPending: Previous Google sign-in did not finish — refresh the page

errors.envUnsupported: Authentication is not supported in this environment.
errors.credentialInUse: This credential is already used by another account.
errors.recentLogin: Please sign in again to continue.
errors.permissionDenied: Profile save was denied. Hard-refresh (Ctrl+F5) and try again; contact support if it persists.
errors.googleFailed: Google sign-in could not be completed
errors.generic: Could not complete the operation — try again.
errors.authFailEmailInUseAlt: AUTH_FAIL: This email is already registered (EMAIL_IN_USE)

errors.googleDomainBody: Domain is not on the Firebase Authorized domains list.
